SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAIRA FREGOSO'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 5, 2014 FOR THE DEFENDANT TO BRING THE FOLLOWING EVIDENCE TO THE HEARING TO SUBSTANTIATE HER CLAIM THAT THE MONEY IN THE LEVIED UPON BANK ACCOUNT BELONGED TO HER ROOMMATES: (1) EVIDENCE OF THE TRANSFERS OF FUNDS FROM HER ROOMMATES TO DEFENDANT AND (2) CHECKS (OR OTHER PROOF OF PAYMENT) FROM THE PREVIOUS TWO MONTHS SHOWING THE AMOUNT OF RENT PAID TO THE LANDLORD. IF THE RENT IS NOT DIVIDED EQUALLY AMONG THE ROOMMATES, DEFENDANT IS ALSO REQUIRED TO BRING EVIDENCE THAT ESTABLISHES THE AMOUNT OF RENT EACH ROOMMATE PAYS. ADDITIONALLY, TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT CLAIMS THE OTHER MONEY LEVIED UPON IS EXEMPT, DEFENDANT MUST BRING PROOF THAT THE FUNDS CAN BE TRACED TO HER PAID EARNINGS. (SEE CCP SEC. 704.070.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/EHG)
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (CONTINUANCE OF HEARING)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREGOSO, SAIRA I $5,379.82 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,379.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - SAIRA FREGOSO, TEL. NO. (619) 863-6665, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - DEFENDANT SAIRA FREGOSO'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The levying officer is directed to release $2,400.00 held to the judgment debtor. The levying officer is directed to release $376.03 held to the judgment creditor for the payment of the judgment. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Continued To Dec-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - SAIRA I FREGOSO, TEL. NO. (619)863-6665, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Defendant Saira Fregoso's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to December 5, 2014 for the Defendant to bring the following evidence to the hearing to substantiate her claim that the money in the levied upon bank account belonged to her roommates: (1) evidence of the transfers of funds from her roommates to Defendant and (2) checks (or other proof of payment) from the previous two months showing the amount of rent paid to the landlord. If the rent is not divided equally among the roommates, Defendant is also required to bring evidence that establishes the amount of rent each roommate pays. Additionally, to the extent that Defendant claims the other money levied upon is exempt, Defendant must bring proof that the funds can be traced to her paid earnings. (See CCP sec. 704.070.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
